117869.description_ja_long: 栃木・群馬県境に連なる袈裟丸連峰の一峰で、奥・中・前の峰々と稜線を成す。ツツジの名所として知られ、ヤシオツツジやレンゲツツジが順に山肌を染める静かな山。
117869.description_ja_short: ヤシオツツジが山肌を染める、袈裟丸連峰の静かな一峰。
117869.description_en_long: Ushirokesamaruyama is one peak of the Kesamaru Range along the Tochigi-Gunma border, forming a ridgeline with the Oku, Naka, and Mae peaks. A quiet mountain noted for its azaleas, where yashio and renge azaleas dye the slopes in turn.
117869.description_en_short: A quiet peak of the Kesamaru Range, its slopes dyed in turn by yashio and renge azaleas.
